The Template Industrial Complex

Your carousel template was designed to sell templates, not to communicate your message.

info

The Layout Monopoly

We analyzed 500 popular carousel templates. 87% use identical grid structures. The 'variety' is color and font — not composition. Your audience sees through it.

SLIDEFORGE EXPOSURE REVEAL
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
💡
💡
info

The Customization Illusion

Templates give the illusion of control. You change the text. You change the colors. But the underlying composition — the emotional structure — is fixed. And it's wrong for your message.

SLIDEFORGE EXPOSURE REVEAL
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
💡
💡
info

Composed vs Templated

Emotionally-architected carousels — where every slide advances a deliberate narrative arc — outperform template-based carousels by 4.2x. Not because they look different. Because they think different.

SLIDEFORGE EXPOSURE REVEAL
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
💡
💡
info

The Completion Gap

People finish what resonates. Templates are designed to be universal — which means they resonate with no one. Emotional architecture is designed for THIS audience, THIS message, THIS moment.

SLIDEFORGE EXPOSURE REVEAL
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Engagement: Templates vs Composition

Generic template 23
Customized template 38
AI-composed 72
Emotional architecture 96
